heading: Barro Colorado Island in Gatun Lake to be set aside
label: 79 Barro Colorado Island in Gatun Lake to be set aside
text: The President is authorized and directed to set aside within the Canal Zone an area in Gatun Lake known as Barro Colorado Island in which the natural features shall, except in event of declared national emergency, be left in their natural state for scientific observation and investigation.
notes: References in TextFor definition of Canal Zone, referred to in text, see , Foreign Relations and Intercourse.section 3602(b) of Title 22
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1381 of Title 48
